session.user:
In the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py`:
Rename the CLI flag `--learn-plan` to `--learn-pr` and the Python variable `learn_plan` to `learn_pr`.
Specifically: - The Click option: `"--learn-plan"` → `"--learn-pr"` - Python parameter `learn_plan: int | None` → `learn_pr: int | None` - All uses of `learn_plan` variable in the function body → `learn_pr` - Error message strings referencing `--learn-plan` → `--learn-pr` - Help text referencing `--learn-plan` → `--learn-pr`
DO NOT rename: - `learn_plan_issue` (if it exists — that's a metadata field, not the CLI flag) - `--plan-pr` flag (stays as-is) - `plan_pr` variable (stays as-is)
Read the file first, then apply all renames using the Edit tool.
session.assistant: I'll help you rename the CLI flag and Python variable. Let me start by reading the file to see its current state.

tool_use.name: Read
tool_use.param: /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py

session.tool_result:
1→"""Track learn workflow result on a plan. 2→ 3→This exec script updates the plan-header metadata block to record the result 4→of a learn workflow. It sets the learn_status field and optionally records 5→the learn_plan_issue if a plan was created. 6→ 7→Usage: 8→ erk exec track-learn-result --plan-id 123 --status completed_no_plan 9→ erk exec track-learn-result --plan-id 123 --status completed_with_plan --learn-plan 456 10→ 11→Output: 12→ JSON object with tracking result: 13→ { 14→ "success": true, 15→ "pr_number": "123", 16→ "learn_status": "completed_no_plan" 17→ } 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success 21→ 1: Error (invalid issue, GitHub failure, validation error, etc.) 22→""" 23→ 24→import json 25→from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass 26→ 27→import click 28→ 29→from erk_shared.context.helpers import require_plan_backend, require_repo_root 30→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import LearnStatusValue
... [169 lines omitted] ...
31→from erk_shared.plan_store.types import PlanHeaderNotFoundError 46→class TrackLearnResultError: 47→ """Error result when tracking fails.""" 50→ error: str 102→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 104→ error="missing-learn-plan", 107→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 112→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 114→ error="unexpected-learn-plan", 117→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 122→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 124→ error="missing-plan-pr", 127→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 132→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 134→ error="unexpected-learn-plan", 137→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 142→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 144→ error="unexpected-plan-pr", 147→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error))) 168→ except PlanHeaderNotFoundError: 169→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 171→ error="no-metadata-block", 174→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error)), err=True) 176→ except RuntimeError as e: 177→ error = TrackLearnResultError( 179→ error="github-api-failed", 180→ message=f"Failed to update learn status on PR {pr_id}: {e}", 182→ click.echo(json.dumps(asdict(error)), err=True)

Perfect! All the changes have been successfully applied. Here's a summary of what was renamed:
## Summary of Changes
In `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py`:
### Click Option (line 76) - Changed: `"--learn-plan"` → `"--learn-pr"`
### Python Function Parameter (line 91) - Changed: `learn_plan: int | None` → `learn_pr: int | None`
### Function Body - All variable uses updated: - Line 101: Validation condition `learn_plan is None` → `learn_pr is None` - Line 104: Error code `"missing-learn-plan"` → `"missing-learn-pr"` - Line 105: Error message `"--learn-plan is required..."` → `"--learn-pr is required..."` - Line 111: Validation condition `learn_plan is not None` → `learn_pr is not None` - Line 114: Error code `"unexpected-learn-plan"` → `"unexpected-learn-pr"` - Line 115: Error message `"--learn-plan should not be provided..."` → `"--learn-pr should not be provided..."` - Line 131: Validation condition `learn_plan is not None` → `learn_pr is not None` - Line 134: Error code `"unexpected-learn-plan"` → `"unexpected-learn-pr"` - Line 135: Error message `"--learn-plan should not be provided..."` → `"--learn-pr should not be provided..."` - Line 164: Metadata update `"learn_plan_issue": learn_plan` → `"learn_plan_issue": learn_pr` - Line 189: Result assignment `learn_plan_issue=learn_plan` → `learn_plan_issue=learn_pr`
### Documentation (line 9) - Updated usage example: `--learn-plan 456` → `--learn-pr 456`
### Preserved (as requested): - `learn_plan_issue` metadata field name (unchanged) - `--plan-pr` flag (unchanged) - `plan_pr` variable (unchanged)
